subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Your detailed letter was read a few days ago. Now, owing to lack of time, a reply cannot yet be rendered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه مفصل شما چند روز پیش قرائت گردید حال از عدم مجال جواب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @past, present and future of Iran
